themes: The backlog skews heavily toward Manager-level contacts across multi-location franchise, residential property, and hospitality brands, signaling a need for product conversations centered on day-to-day reporting efficiency and location management workflows rather than enterprise governance.

Several accounts appear multiple times with different contacts and varying wait times — including Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Avenue5 Residential, and Anytime Fitness — suggesting these organizations have broad internal interest in product feedback and may benefit from a consolidated or account-level conversation strategy.

Wait times range from 7 to 359 days with a large cluster exceeding 100 days, indicating a systemic backlog that risks customer trust and retention; prioritizing the longest-waiting and most frequently represented accounts will be critical to demonstrating responsiveness and capturing actionable product insights.
